evals.prompt: Create a single task from spec-012 to validate JWT expiration in auth middleware. Ask clarifying questions first, then save it under spec/tasks/ with the next available id.
evals.expected_output: A new task file saved under spec/tasks/ with atomic scope, local context, acceptance criteria, and test requirements.

evals.prompt: Using tech plan plan-003, generate 4 atomic tasks and save them under spec/tasks/. Ask clarifying questions before writing. Update the tasks index.
evals.expected_output: Four new task files saved under spec/tasks/ with unique ids and index entries.
